name: What damages for trademark harm from Perplexity hallucinations?

mainEntity.name: What damages for trademark harm from Perplexity hallucinations?

acceptedAnswer.description: Actual damages, defendant's profits, treble for willfulness under Lanham Act.[1] NYT claims false origin confuses users.[1] Key factors: survey evidence of confusion, reputational surveys.[1] Injunctions primary; quantify lost goodwill. High if trademarks registered.
